NVIDIA Q4 FY2026 earnings report tomorrow (Feb 25). Expected $1.53 EPS (+72% YoY), $65.7B revenue. Massive market impact expected.
6 positions continue EXIT_SIGNAL status: AI, CLNE, ASAN, ATRA, PTON, OPK. Combined unrealized loss: -$5,603. Recommend liquidation within 5 trading days.
